findings.description: Azure Blob Storage account 'medsecurephidocs' containing PHI documents and DICOM images has public network access enabled. Must use private endpoints only.
findings.remediation: Set publicNetworkAccess to Disabled, configure private endpoint connections, ensure all service connections use private link.

findings.description: Azure SQL Server uses service-managed TDE key instead of customer-managed key from Key Vault. PHI encryption key not under customer control.
findings.remediation: Configure TDE with customer-managed key from Azure Key Vault Managed HSM. Enable auto-rotation.

findings.description: AKS cluster does not enforce Pod Security Standards 'restricted' profile. Containers processing PHI can run as root, mount host paths, and access host network.
findings.remediation: Enable Pod Security Standards with 'restricted' profile. Apply Calico network policies for microsegmentation between tenants.

findings.description: Azure Key Vault has soft-delete and purge protection enabled. PHI encryption keys are protected against accidental or malicious deletion.
Cosmos DB account storing patient FHIR records has public network access enabled with IP-based firewall. Should use private endpoints exclusively.
findings.remediation: Disable public network access, configure private endpoints from AKS VNet. Update connection strings in services.

findings.description: Logic Apps integration endpoint accepts TLS 1.0 and 1.1 connections. HL7v2 EHR integrations may use outdated TLS versions.
findings.remediation: Set minimum TLS version to 1.2. Coordinate with EHR partners to upgrade their TLS stacks.

findings.description: Azure Container Registry does not enforce content trust (image signing). Unsigned container images can be deployed to AKS cluster processing PHI.
findings.remediation: Enable Docker Content Trust (Notary v2). Configure admission controller to reject unsigned images.

findings.description: Network Security Group allows inbound SSH (port 22) from Internet to AKS node pool. Management access should be via Azure Bastion only.
findings.remediation: Remove Internet-facing SSH rule. Configure Azure Bastion for jump-box access. Use JIT VM access.

findings.description: Diagnostic logging not enabled for Azure Event Hub and Service Bus. Missing audit trail for PHI message processing (HIPAA 164.312(b) violation).
findings.remediation: Enable diagnostic settings for all PaaS services, send logs to Log Analytics workspace. Include allLogs and allMetrics categories.

findings.description: Single user-assigned managed identity shared across 8 microservices. Compromising any service grants access to all Azure resources the identity can reach.
findings.remediation: Create per-service managed identities with minimum-privilege RBAC. Use workload identity federation for AKS pods.

findings.description: Microsoft Sentinel missing custom analytics rules for HIPAA-specific threats: VIP patient access monitoring, after-hours bulk PHI export, consent override patterns.
findings.remediation: Deploy HIPAA-specific Sentinel analytics rules from Healthcare solution pack. Add custom rules for consent management anomalies.

findings.description: Azure Cache for Redis has non-SSL port disabled. All connections require TLS.
